### Spec
#### Schema
```yaml
allowPasswordSignup: boolean
disableAuth: boolean
displayName: string
enableAnonymousUser: boolean
enableEmailLinkSignin: boolean
mfaConfig:
  enabledProviders:
  - string
  state: string
resourceID: string
testPhoneNumbers:
  string: string
```

<table class="properties responsive">
<thead>
    <tr>
        <th colspan="2">Fields</th>
    </tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>allowPasswordSignup</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">boolean</code></p>
            <p>Whether to allow email/password user authentication.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>disableAuth</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">boolean</code></p>
            <p>Whether authentication is disabled for the tenant. If true, the users under the disabled tenant are not allowed to sign-in. Admins of the disabled tenant are not able to manage its users.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>displayName</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Display name of the tenant.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>enableAnonymousUser</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">boolean</code></p>
            <p>Whether to enable anonymous user authentication.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>enableEmailLinkSignin</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">boolean</code></p>
            <p>Whether to enable email link user authentication.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>mfaConfig</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">object</code></p>
            <p>The tenant-level configuration of MFA options.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>mfaConfig.enabledProviders</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">list (string)</code></p>
            <p>A list of usable second factors for this project.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>mfaConfig.enabledProviders[]</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p></p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>mfaConfig.state</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Whether MultiFactor Authentication has been enabled for this project. Possible values: STATE_UNSPECIFIED, DISABLED, ENABLED, MANDATORY</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>resourceID</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">string</code></p>
            <p>Immutable. Optional. The service-generated name of the resource. Used for acquisition only. Leave unset to create a new resource.</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
        <td>
            <p><code>testPhoneNumbers</code></p>
            <p><i>Optional</i></p>
        </td>
        <td>
            <p><code class="apitype">map (key: string, value: string)</code></p>
            <p>A map of <test phone number, fake code> pairs that can be used for MFA. The phone number should be in E.164 format (https://www.itu.int/rec/T-REC-E.164/) and a maximum of 10 pairs can be added (error will be thrown once exceeded).</p>
        </td>
    </tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Sample YAML(s)

### Typical Use Case
```yaml
apiVersion: identityplatform.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: IdentityPlatformTenant
metadata:
  name: identityplatformtenant-sample
spec:
  displayName: "sample-tenant"
  allowPasswordSignup: true
  enableAnonymousUser: false
  mfaConfig:
    state: "ENABLED"
  testPhoneNumbers:
    "+12345678901": "123451"
    "+16505550000": "123450"
```

Note: If you have any trouble with instantiating the resource, refer to <a href="https://docs.cloud.google.com/config-connector/docs/troubleshooting">Troubleshoot Config Connector</a>.
